{{Infobox technique
| name = Azure Moon Reigns
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]] is a technique that combines a [[Forger]] and [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]] is a [[Ruler technique]] that pushes against water in the body to slow and make the target clumsy.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]] is a technique that gathers [[water aura]] and [[madra]] into a floating blue light.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Azure Moon Reigns]] is a technique used by Sophara that creates a sphere of sapphire [[madra]] and [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
